untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders Bottom requires detection of three distinct troughs and two distinct intervening peaks across multiple bars. This multi-bar pattern structure with explicit sequencing of five features (left shoulder trough, rise, head trough, rise, right shoulder trough) cannot be fully captured by single-bar or simple indicator crossovers. A true implementation would require multi-bar pattern recognition logic or custom lookback arrays, which exceeds the scope of single-bar indicator conditions.
